reasoning: The Polymarket estimate for this event was 4% on October 30, 2025, which is just 10 days before the knowledge cutoff. Given the short time remaining until the December 31, 2025 deadline (less than two months), Bitcoin's price would have to rally drastically in a very compressed timeframe. The market price constitutes an extremely strong aggregator of all available information up to that point. In the absence of evidence showing a massive price shock in early November 2025, adhering closely to the market's 4% probability is the most rational forecast.
